inputs.label: Period (T)
inputs.businessContext: Time for one complete cycle. Used in f = 1/T.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time for one complete cycle. Used in f = 1/T.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir tam döngü için geçen süre. f = 1/T formülünde kullanılır.

inputs.label: Number of Cycles
inputs.businessContext: Number of cycles observed. Used with Total Time to compute frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cycles observed. Used with Total Time to compute frequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemlenen döngü sayısı. Frekansı hesaplamak için Toplam Süre ile birlikte kullanılır.

inputs.label: Total Time
inputs.businessContext: Total time over which cycles were counted. Used in f = cycles / time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time over which cycles were counted. Used in f = cycles / time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Döngülerin sayıldığı toplam süre. f = döngü/süre formülünde kullanılır.

inputs.label: Velocity (v)
inputs.businessContext: Wave propagation speed. Used with Wavelength to compute frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wave propagation speed. Used with Wavelength to compute frequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalga yayılma hızı. Frekansı hesaplamak için Dalga Boyu ile birlikte kullanılır.

inputs.label: Wavelength (λ)
inputs.businessContext: Distance between successive peaks. Used with Velocity in f = v/λ.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between successive peaks. Used with Velocity in f = v/λ.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ardışık tepeler arasındaki mesafe. f = v/λ formülünde Hız ile birlikte kullanılır.

inputs.label: Angular Frequency (ω)
inputs.businessContext: Angular frequency in radians per second. Converted to Hz via f = ω/(2π).

businessContext_i18n.en: Angular frequency in radians per second. Converted to Hz via f = ω/(2π).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Radyan/saniye cinsinden açısal frekans. f = ω/(2π) ile Hz'e dönüştürülür.

inputs.label: Revolutions per Minute (RPM)
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed in revolutions per minute. Converted to Hz via f = RPM/60.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rotational speed in revolutions per minute. Converted to Hz via f = RPM/60.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikadaki devir cinsinden dönüş hızı. f = RPM/60 ile Hz'e dönüştürülür.

formulas.frequency: period !== 0 ? 1 / period : (cycles !== 0 && time !== 0 ? cycles / time : (velocity !== 0 && wavelength !== 0 ? velocity / wavelength : (angularFrequency !== 0 ? angularFrequency / (2 * Math.PI) : (rpm !== 0 ? rpm / 60 : 0))))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
